title: T-054 — npd_projects + gate_checklist_items + gate_approvals tables (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-054 — Stage-Gate core tables

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.3, §17.4, §17.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the three foundational Stage-Gate tables (npd_projects, gate_checklist_items, gate_approvals) with R13 audit columns + RLS + indexes per §17.3-§17.5 DDL.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0054_npd_projects_and_gates.sql per PRD §17.3-§17.5 DDL exactly: npd_projects (UUID PK, code UNIQUE, current_gate G0..G4|Launched, current_stage, prio, owner, target_launch, product_code FK fa, R13 audit cols), gate_checklist_items (UUID PK, project_id ON DELETE CASCADE, gate_code, category_code, item_text, required, completed_at, completed_by_user, evidence_file), gate_approvals (UUID PK, project_id, gate_code, decision in approved/rejected, approver_user_id, esigned_at, esign_hash).
2. Indexes: gate_checklist_items (tenant_id, project_id, gate_code) + gate_approvals (tenant_id, project_id, gate_code).
3. ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + tenant_isolation policies on all three tables.
4. Drizzle schemas in packages/db/src/schema/npd-projects.ts + gate-checklist-items.ts + gate-approvals.ts; barrel updated.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0054_npd_projects_and_gates.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/npd-projects.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/gate-checklist-items.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/gate-approvals.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/npd-projects-and-gates.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0054 runs, when \d npd_projects runs, then it lists code (UNIQUE), current_gate, current_stage, prio, owner, target_launch, product_code FK fa(product_code), and R13 audit cols (created_at, created_by_user, app_version, schema_version) per §17.3 DDL
2. Given an npd_projects row exists, when DELETE on it runs, then matching gate_checklist_items rows are CASCADE-deleted but gate_approvals rows are retained per §17.4 vs §17.5 DDL (CASCADE only on checklist_items)
3. Given two tenants seeded, when tenant A SELECT * FROM gate_approvals runs, then it returns only tenant A rows (RLS verified)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/npd-projects-and-gates.test.ts asserting schema shape + cascade rules + RLS isolation before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test npd-projects-and-gates'

## Risk red lines
- Do not omit ON DELETE CASCADE on gate_checklist_items (per §17.4 DDL)
- Do not allow ON DELETE CASCADE on gate_approvals (audit immutable)
- Do not skip RLS on any of the three tables
